**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Zhejiang Jifeng Precision Electronics Co., Ltd. represents a highly strategic expansion of a specialized semiconductor testing entity. Its former name, 'Shanghai Zhentai Semiconductor Technology' (Shanghai Probe Card Semiconductor Tech), and its USCC (91310112) indicating an original registration in Minhang District, Shanghai, reveal its deep roots in China's core IC hub. The relocation to Jiashan, Zhejiang (a crucial node connecting Shanghai and Zhejiang's manufacturing belts) as a wholly-owned corporate subsidiary highlights a transition from pure R&D in Shanghai to scaled manufacturing. With 11M RMB paid-in capital and 65 insured employees, this is an active, precision-manufacturing plant. The corporate email domain '@giga-force.com' identifies it as part of the Giga Force ecosystem, a well-known provider of semiconductor testing solutions, probe cards, and specialized electronic components.
